## RawResource.getSnapshot property

Synchronous read of the current snapshot, suitable for `useSyncExternalStore`<!-- -->. The returned object reference changes on every transition.

**Signature:**

```typescript
getSnapshot: () => ResourceSnapshot<T>;
```
